data.title: Reverse a Linked List
data.description: Given the head of a singly linked list, reverse the list, and return the modified head pointer. Optimize for O(N) time and O(1) space constraints.

data.title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
data.description: You are given an array of strings tokens that represents an arithmetic expression in a Reverse Polish Notation. Evaluate the expression using a Stack structure.

data.title: Merge k Sorted Lists
data.description: You are given an array of k linked-lists lists, each linked-list is sorted in ascending order. Merge all the linked-lists into one sorted linked-list and return it.

data.title: Implement Queue using Stacks
data.description: Implement a first in first out (FIFO) queue using only two stacks. The implemented queue should support all the functions of a normal queue (push, peek, pop, and empty).
